title: S.R. Batliboi is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Lead)

jsonLd.title: S.R. Batliboi is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
S.R. Batliboi is actively seeking a talented and motivated Credit Analyst to join our dynamic team in Srinagar. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About S.R. Batliboi:
S.R. Batliboi is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in SAP FICO

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Flexible working hours
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with S.R. Batliboi!
